system.description: Mandrake: This root is found throughout Naqan and can be used to brew a Poison that is slow but causes terrible delirium. It kills in 1d10 days and causes symptoms in hours. Those affected become confused and lethargic, slipping into a coma prior to death. Locating mandrake is a TN 5 Talent (Poison) roll or a TN 7 Survival roll.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.remedy: Yellow Phoenix Pills or corresponding antidote
